name: Amnemonic Charm
description:
Activate (Free Action) (concentrate)

Trigger You fail or critically fail a Deception, Diplomacy, or Intimidation check to Coerce, Lie, Make an Impression, or Request

Requirements You're a master in the skill you failed with.

This ornate locket, usually containing a faceless, humanoid portrait, is typically worn on a chain around the neck or attached to your clothing. When activated, the charm casts a Rewrite Memory spell (DC 26 Will check) against a single target of the check, removing all memory of your failed attempt and potentially allowing you to make another attempt. The effect can't remove more than 3 minutes of memories from its target.
